title: Fix KVCache to support n_kv_heads != n_q_heads
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

ferrotorch-nn/src/transformer.rs KVCache (line 613) hardcodes num_heads in dim 1 of [B, num_heads, S, D]; shape validation at line 729 (sa[1] != sb[1]) assumes uniform head count. Incompatible with GQA.

Work:
- Track num_kv_heads separately from num_q_heads in KVCache.
- Cache shape becomes [B, num_kv_heads, S, head_dim]; repeat_kv happens at read time (inside attention), not at cache time. This keeps the cache at ~1/4 the size for Llama 3 8B.
- Update prefill_cached and decode_one_cached (or the ferrotorch-gpu equivalents) to respect the GQA shape.
- Update concat_along_dim2 / shape checks.

Acceptance:
- KVCache::new(num_kv_heads=8, ...) then update with K/V tensors of head-dim 8 succeeds.
- Decoder step using this cache produces outputs matching un-cached GQA attention on the same inputs.

Depends on GQA issue.
